name: living in the bronx during the 1970's | 📻 | 3rd person
description:
for bhm at my school we're learning about hip hop and the bronx and lowkey living in the ghetto in the bronx seems fucking cool so (i'm being held at gunshot by my best friend)

i'm gonna try to make an rpg of what life was like back then! this rp will have:
gang violence
drug abuse
murders

police brutality

racism

if youre uncomfortable with that then pls don"t interact!<3
songs i recommend listening to
the message by grandmaster flash and the furious 5
i can't go for that by daryll hall and john oats
rapper's delight by im not typing allat just click on the link
hope u enjoy1

also im still editing it <3
creator: koozy ⃞○
